THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCZAK, MARCIET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 162 TAYLOR ST. #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,480.32 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,480.32, STAYED UNTIL AUG-22-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFT. VACATE BY SAID DATE, DEFT. IS ENTITLED ON EX PARTE NOTICE TO HAVE JUDGMENT VACATED & S/A & THE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, B.S. AS TO DEFENDANT MARCZAK, MARCIET DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MARCZAK, MARCIET ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

JUDGE PETER SHERWOOD, RPTR. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. DAVID G. MENDEZ DEFT. IN PRO PER, CORRECT SPELLING IS MACIEJ MARCZAK 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. ALL PRESENT. SETTL. REACHED: JUDGMNT. FOR PLTF. AGAINST DEFT. FOR $3,480.32. RESTIT. OF PREMISES 162 TAYLOR ST. #7, SFCA 94102. WRIT ISSUE F/W. STAY TIL 5PM, 8/22/94. IF DEFT. VACATE TIMELY PLTF. WILL FILE EXPARTE MOT. TO SET ASIDE JUDGMNT W/I 7 DAYS AND DISMISS THE CASE W/PREJUDICE. EACH SIDE PAY THEIR OWN FEES. THERE IS NO OTHER OCCUPANT. EACH SIDE RELEASES THE OTHER FROM ANY CLAIMS. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMNT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCZAK, MARCIET
